final:
module DAC (
    input [7:0] din,
    output [9:0] dout
);
    assign dout = din * 4;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      dout <= din; // This line intentionally misrepresents the intended behavior
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: dout <= din; // This line intentionally misrepresents the intended behavior
